title: Odontosoria decipiens
taxonomy: Odontosoria decipiens is classified within the family Lindsaeaceae, a family of ferns commonly known as clematis ferns or net-veined ferns. This family belongs to the order Polypodiales, which is a large and diverse group of ferns. The order Polypodiales is further classified under the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that also includes the orders Hymenophorales and Osmundales.
